emails.subject: Re: 1/12/01 Checkout
emails.body: Re: 1/12/01 Checkout Amerex checked out incorrectly Mike Driscoll just talked to the broker, who was aware of that and said they would re-check out. Let me know if he communicates this to his back office. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 01/12/2001 11:24 AM
